name: سيف صائد الشياطين
title: سيف صائد الشياطين
overview_en: Jinta journeys through a century spanning epic all while questioning why he wields a sword

name: グリザイアの果実
title: グリザイアの果実
overview_en: Mihama Academy on the surface a closed learning environment established to nurture students who find themselves at odds with the world around them in actuality an orchard cum prison built to preserve fruit that has fallen too far from its tree Yet with the arrival of the institute s first male student the nearly preposterously opaque Kazami Yuuji the students at Mihama begin to fall out of step with their predetermined rhythms Will Yuuji prove to be the element the girls around him needed to take hold of their lives once more or will the weight of their pasts prove too steep a wall to overcome

overview: هيسونا أماكاسو مُجنّدة جديدة انضمّت حديثًا إلى قوّة الدفاع الذاتي الجويّة ويختارها تنين مُتخفٍّ داخل قاعدة غيفو الجوية لتكون قائدته
name: هيسونا والتنين
title: هيسونا والتنين
overview_en: Recently stationed Air Self Defense Force rookie Hisone Amakasu is chosen by a dragon concealed within Gifu Air Base to be his pilot

name: 監獄学園
title: 監獄学園
overview_en: There was a time when the Hachimitsu Private Academy was a revered and elite all girls boarding school on the outskirts of Tokyo but a recent policy revision is allowing boys into the student body On his first day Kiyoshi Fujino discovers that he s one of only five boys enrolled at the school Completely overwhelmed by the thousands of girls on campus the few boys find that their situation is less than ideal
